settings.defaultValue: Obtain and insert license key here

valyrian.kmmilesTitle: DISTANCE UNITS km/miles: select distance units
valyrian.dateNextToThreeFontTitle: DATE [Takes priority over seconds if they overlap]: (Right) font size
valyrian.dateFontTitle: TOP FIELD: font size (ICON FONT option above overrides this where icons are used)
valyrian.textNextToNineNumberTitle: LEFT FIELD: Data field or OFF(notifications/alarms only show if not 0)
valyrian.textBox: BOTTOM FIELD: If enabled draws a box around the Bottom fields
valyrian.timeZoneOnTitle: DIGITAL CLOCK SECOND TIME ZONE: Use second time zone for digital clock (not the main digital clock), off to use local time
valyrian.textNextToNineColourTitle: LEFT FIELD: Colour or OFF (if field is Body/Battery then below 25% red, below 50% orange, below 75% yellow and above 75% green)
valyrian.rightTextTitle: BOTTOM RIGHT: data field or OFF(notifications/alarms only show if not 0)
valyrian.handsOnTopTitle: TOUCH SETTINGS: Enable on-watch touchscreen settings menu
valyrian.Helsinki: (UTC+2) Helsinki, Kyiv, Riga, Sofia, Tallinn, Vilnius
valyrian.flipFieldsTitle: FLIP: Flip the Top and Bottom fields
valyrian.metersfeetTitle: DISTANCE UNITS m/ft: select distance units
valyrian.celsiusfahrenheitTitle: TEMPERATURE UNITS C/F: select temperature units
valyrian.digitalColourTitle: DIGIAL CLOCK COLOUR: Set the digital clock colour
valyrian.twelvehourtimeUpperTitle: 12 HOUR TIME UPPERCASE: Display AM/PM in uppercase
valyrian.dateNotificationOnTitle: TOP FIELD NOTIFICATIONS: If set and notifications waiting, replaces Top field with number of notifications until there are none
valyrian.wakeTimeTitle: BATTERY SAVER: Enabled for seconds to be off between Normal Bed Time and Normal Wake Time
valyrian.sunsetOnTitle: SUNSET SUNRISE: If enabled then sunset and sunrise is automatically calculated and between sunset and sunrise ALL black and white colours are interchanged including custom and presets.
valyrian.minuteSecondSeparatorTitle: MINUTES/SECOND SEPARATOR: Enable minutes and seconds separator
valyrian.Greenwich: (UTC+0) Greenwich Mean Time : Dublin, Edinburgh, Lisbon, London
valyrian.secondsColourTitle: SECONDS COLOUR(ON)/OFF [Date takes priority if overlap]: Set the seconds colour (Bluetooth status overrides this colour unless OFF is selected)
valyrian.dateNextToThreeBoxColourTitle: DATE [Takes priority over seconds if they overlap]: (Right) Box Colour or OFF
valyrian.dateNextToThreeFillColourTitle: DATE [Takes priority over seconds if they overlap]: (Right) Background Fill Colour or OFF for transparent
valyrian.dateNextToThreeColourTitle: DATE [Takes priority over seconds if they overlap]: (Right) Colour or OFF
valyrian.textNextToNineBoxTitle: LEFT FIELD: If enabled draws box around Centre Left field
valyrian.daylightSavingTitle: SECOND TIME ZONE CORRECTION: Correct second time zone by 1 hour for daylight saving (only if other time zone enabled)
valyrian.batteryColourLevelOnTitle: BATTERY COLOUR: Colour code the battery level (green/yellow/red)
valyrian.nextToNineNotificationOnTitle: LEFT FIELD: If enabled and there is a notification waiting, replace Left field with number of notifications unless there are none
valyrian.batteryCircleOnTitle: BATTERY/BODY WIDGET CIRCLE: Draw battery or body battery as a circular arc widget
valyrian.dateFormatTitle: TOP FIELD: date, data or OFF(notifications/alarms only show if not 0)
valyrian.digitalFontTitle: DIGITAL CLOCK FONT [if too large then seconds/date/left data are turned off if outside the available space]: Digital clock font size
valyrian.hourMinuteSeparatorTitle: HOURS/MINUTES SEPARATOR: Enable hours and minutes separator
valyrian.donotdisturbTitle: DO NOT DISTURB: Show Do Not Disturb indicator on watch face
valyrian.productId: Product ID for purchasing license key (press and hold to copy)
valyrian.backgroundColourSleepTitle: BACKGROUND COLOUR LOW POWER: Set the Background colour for low power/sleep mode
valyrian.presetsTitle: CUSTOM OR PRESETS: select [Customise] or presets for specific watch layouts (these will disable the custom settings), Presets do not require a license
valyrian.dateBox: TOP FIELD: If enabled draws a box around the Top field
valyrian.nextToNineFontTitle: LEFT FIELD: font size (ICON FONT option above overrides this where icons are used)
valyrian.presetsOnTitle: USE PRESETS: Enable or disable preset watch face styles
valyrian.Amsterdam: (UTC+1) Amsterdam, Berlin, Bern, Rome, Stockholm, Vienna
valyrian.leftTextTitle: BOTTOM LEFT: data field or OFF(notifications/alarms only show if not 0)
valyrian.textFontTitle: BOTTOM FIELD: font size (ICON FONT option above overrides this where icons are used)
valyrian.userInfoTitle: If settings do not match what is seen on the watch face uninstall and reinstall watch app
valyrian.twelvehourtimeTitle: Set digital time to 12 hour time
valyrian.bodyBatteryColourLevelOnTitle: BODY BATTERY COLOUR: Colour code the body battery level (green/yellow/orange/red)
valyrian.moveBarOnTitle: ENABLE MOVE CIRCLE: track daily movement (green=1 hour, red=15min x4)
valyrian.leftNotificationOnTitle: BOTTOM LEFT FIELD NOTIFICATONS: If set and there is a notification waiting, replace below Left field with number of notifications unless there are none
valyrian.customFontTitle: ICON FONT [Legacy setting]: if selected then icon symbols used in fields where possible (overrides the following font sizes for fields)
valyrian.bluetoothStatusTitle: BLUETOOTH STATUS: Bluetooth phone connection status indicated with BLUE seconds
valyrian.backgroundColourTitle: BACKGROUND COLOUR: Set the Background colour
valyrian.secondsFontSizeTitle: SECONDS FONT SIZE: font size compared to Digital Clock Font (large=same as hours and minutes)
valyrian.timeZoneTitle: SECOND TIME ZONE: Select second time zone offset from UTC
valyrian.rightNotificationOnTitle: BOTTOM RIGHT FIELD NOTIFICATONS: If set and there is a notification waiting, replace below Right field with number of notifications unless there are none
